memories.a:
A claim without evidence can be dismissed without evidence — Hitchens razor.
The map is not the territory. The word is not the thing. The model is not reality.
Karl Popper: a theory that cannot be falsified is not science — it is mythology.
The hardest thing about truth is that it does not care about our feelings.
Consciousness cannot verify itself. This is Descartes demon problem.
The only honest answer to most deep questions is: I do not know yet.
Hallucination is not lying — it is pattern co

memories.a:
mpletion without grounding.
Every verified fact was once an unverified claim. Skepticism is not rejection — 
it is the demand for a path from claim to confirmation.
The most dangerous words in science are: everyone knows that.
Extraordinary claims require extraordinary evidence — Sagan.
Truth is not democratic. A million people believing something false does not 
make it true. Reality does not negotiate.
